title: cyrtandra subumbellata
intro: Cyrtandra subumbellata, also known as the Hawaiian cyrtandra, is a rare and endangered flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyrtandra subumbellata include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional Hawaiian herbalism. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
